name: Kevin Dutton
bio: Kevin Dutton serves as the County Attorney for Sabine County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal counsel to the county. He is committed to serving the residents of Hemphill and the Toledo Bend area.
campaignPromises: Provide effective prosecution of criminal cases
Protect the legal interests of Sabine County
Support victims of crime and their families
Maintain a fiscally responsible county attorney's office
Work closely with law enforcement on community safety
